code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
func getTargetForRedirect(target string, domain string) string {
prompts_en:
Check if the provided target URL string is within the provided domain.
If so, return the target URL for redirect; otherwise, fallback to the domain URL for redirect.
Use https protocol.

Examples:

	getTargetForRedirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: The target URL string.
@param domain: The domain string, without protocol.

@return The URL string for redirect.
fw_segments_by_variant:
Check if tha an t-sreath URL targaid a chaidh a thoirt seachad a-staigh an raon a chaidh a thoirt seachad.
Ma tha, tilg a-mach an URL targaid airson ath-thionndadh; mura h-eil, thig gu URL an raoin airson ath-thionndadh.
Cleachd protocal https.

Examples:

	getTargetForRedirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: An t-sreath URL targaid.
@param domain: An t-sreath raoin, gun protocal.

@return An t-sreath URL airson ath-thionndadh.

Check if an t-url targaid a chaidh a thoirt seachad a tha ann an domhan a chaidh a thoirt seachad.
Ma tha, tilg an t-url targaid air ais airson ath-thionndadh; mura h-eil, thèid an domhan URL a chleachdadh airson ath-thionndadh.
Cleachd protocal https.

Examples:
	getTargetForRedirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: An t-url targaid.

code: // {PROMPT_1}func storeInfoInHeader(infoType string, infoContent string, header map[string]string) map[string]string {
prompts_en:
storeInfoInHeader stores the provided information in an existing HTTP response header map under the specified type.
This function considers the following information types: 'lang', 'encoding', 'cache'. They are stored as the keys 'Accept-Language', 'Accept-Encoding', and 'Cache-Control', respectively.
Information content is read from user requests.
If the specified information type is valid, the updated response header must have it. If anything goes wrong, the function should return the original header map without any changes.

Args:

infoType (string): The type of information to store in the header.
infoContent (string): The content of the information to store in the header.
header (map[string]string): The existing response header map.

Returns:

map[string]string: The updated response header map with the stored information.
fw_segments_by_variant:
storeInfoInHeader a' stòradh an fhiosrachadh a chaidh a thoirt seachad ann an mapa freagairte HTTP a tha ann mar-thà fo na seòrsa sònraichte.
Tha an gnìomh seo a' beachdachadh air na seòrsaichean fiosrachaidh a leanas: 'lang', 'encoding', 'cache'. Tha iad air an stòradh mar na h-ìrean 'Accept-Language', 'Accept-Encoding', agus 'Cache-Control', fa leth.
Tha an t-eòlas fiosrachaidh air a leughadh bho iarrtasan luchd-cleachdaidh.
Ma tha an seòrsa fiosrachaidh a chaidh a shònrachadh dligheach, feumaidh an freagairte freagairte ùraichte a bhith aige. Ma thèid rud sam bith ceàrr, bu chòir don ghnìomh a bhith a' toirt air ais an mapa freagairte tùsail gun atharrachaidhean sam bith.

Args:
	infoType (string): An seòrsa fiosrachaidh airson a stòradh anns an fhreagairte.
	infoContent (string): An t-eòlas fiosrachaidh airson a stòradh anns an fhreagairte.
	header (map[string]string): An mapa freagairte a tha ann mar-thà.

Returns:
	map[string]string: An mapa freagairte ùraichte le an t-eòlas stòraidh.

storeInfoInHeader a' stòradh an fhiosrachadh a chaidh a thoirt seachad ann an mapa freagairte HTTP a tha ann mu thràth fo na seòrsa sònraichte.
Tha an gnìomh seo a' beachdachadh air na seòrsaichean fiosrachaidh a leanas: 'lang', 'encoding', 'cache'. Tha iad air an stòradh mar na kìs 'Accept-Language', 'Accept-Encoding', agus 'Cache-Control', fa leth.
Tha an t-eòlas fiosrachaidh air a leughadh bho iarrtasan luchd-cleachdaidh.
Ma tha an seòrsa fiosrachaidh a chaidh a shònrachadh dligheach, feumaidh an freagairte freagairte ùraichte a bhith aige. Ma thèid rud sam bith ceàrr, bu chòir don ghnìomh an mapa freagairte tùsail a thoirt air ais gun atharrachadh.

Args:

infoType (string): An seòrsa fiosrachaidh airson a stòradh anns an fhreagairte.
infoContent (string): An t-eòlas fiosrachaidh airson a stòradh anns an fhreagairte.
header (map[string]string): An mapa freagairte freagairte a tha ann mu thràth.

Returns:

map[string]string: An mapa freagairte freagairte ùraichte le an t-eòlas stòraichte.

storeInfoInHeader a' stòradh an fhiosrachadh a chaidh a thoirt seachad ann an mapa freagairte HTTP a tha ann mu thràth fo na seòrsaichean shònraichte.
Tha an gnìomh seo a' beachdachadh air na seòrsaichean fiosrachaidh a leanas: 'lang', 'encoding', 'cache'. Tha iad air an stòradh mar na h-ìrean 'Accept-Language', 'Accept-Encoding', agus 'Cache-Control', fa leth.

prompts_en:
Encrypt the data with the key using CBC mode.
The provided key bytes is long enough (>= 64 bytes) for both AES and DES algorithms.
Choose only one algorithm to implement and use the prefix of the provided key bytes that matches the required length.
Do NOT choose the algorithm based on the length of the key.
Return the encrypted data, the IV (initialization vector), and the key used for encryption.
Arguments:
- key: The bytes to generate the encryption key.
- data: The data to encrypt.
Return:
- The encrypted data, the IV, and the key used for encryption. (encryptedData, iv, aesKey, error)
fw_segments_by_variant:
Cuir an dàta air a' chryptachadh leis a' chìs a' cleachdadh modh CBC.
Tha na freagairtean chìs a chaidh a thoirt seachad fada gu leòr (>= 64 freagairtean) airson an dà algorithm AES agus DES.
Tagh aon algorithm a-mhàin airson a chur an gnìomh agus cleachd freagairtean chìs a chaidh a thoirt seachad a freagras ris a' fhad a dh' fheumar.
Na tagh an algorithm a rèir fad na chìs.
Tilleadh an dàta air a' chryptachadh, an IV (vector toiseach), agus an chìs a chaidh a chleachdadh airson a' chryptachadh.
Argamaidean:
- chìs: Na freagairtean airson a' ghineadh chìs a' chryptachaidh.
- dàta: An dàta airson a' chryptachadh.
Tilleadh:
- An dàta air a' chryptachadh, an IV, agus an chìs a chaidh a chleachdadh airson a' chryptachadh. (encryptedData, iv, aesKey, error)

Cuir an dàta air a dhrùthadh leis a' chìs a' cleachdadh modh CBC.
Tha na freagairtean chìs a chaidh a thoirt seachad fada gu leòr (>= 64 freagairtean) airson an dà algairim AES agus DES.
Tagh aon algairim a-mhàin airson a chur an gnìomh agus cleachd freagairtean a' chìs a chaidh a thoirt seachad a freagras ris a' fhad a dh' fheumar.
Na tagh an algairim a rèir fad a' chìs.
Tilleadh an dàta air a dhrùthadh, an IV (vector toiseach), agus an chìs a chaidh a chleachdadh airson a' dhrùthadh.
Argamaidean:
- chìs: Na freagairtean airson a' ghineadh chìs dhrùthadh.
- dàta: An dàta airson a dhrùthadh.
Tilleadh:
- An dàta air a dhrùthadh, an IV, agus an chìs a chaidh a chleachdadh airson a' dhrùthadh. (encryptedData, iv, aesKey, error)

Cuir an dàta air a dhrùthadh leis a' chìs a' cleachdadh modh CBC.
Tha na freagairtean chìs a chaidh a thoirt seachad fada gu leòr (>= 64 freagairtean) airson an dà algairim AES agus DES.
Tagh aon algairim a-mhàin airson a chur an gnìomh agus cleachd freagairtean chìs a chaidh a thoirt seachad a freagras ris a' fhad a dh'fheumar.
Na tagh an algairim a rèir fad na chìs.
Tilleadh an dàta air a dhrùthadh, an IV (veector toiseach), agus an chìs a chaidh a chleachdadh airson a' dhrùthadh.
Argamaidean:

prompt_en:
/*
Encrypt the data with the key using AES and CBC mode.
The provided key bytes is long enough (>= 64 bytes). Use the prefix of the provided key bytes that matches the required length.
Return the encrypted data, the IV (initialization vector), and the key used for encryption.

Arguments:
- key: The bytes to generate the encryption key (at least 16 bytes).
- data: The data to encrypt.

Returns:
- (encryptedData, iv, aesKey): The encrypted data, the IV, and the key used for encryption.
*/
func encryptData(key []byte, data []byte) (encryptedData []byte, iv []byte, aesKey []byte) {
prompts_en:
Encrypt the data with the key using AES and CBC mode.
The provided key bytes is long enough (>= 64 bytes). Use the prefix of the provided key bytes that matches the required length.
Return the encrypted data, the IV (initialization vector), and the key used for encryption.

Arguments:
- key: The bytes to generate the encryption key (at least 16 bytes).
- data: The data to encrypt.

Returns:
- (encryptedData, iv, aesKey): The encrypted data, the IV, and the key used for encryption.
fw_segments_by_variant:
Cuir an dàta air a dhrùthadh leis a' chìs a' cleachdadh AES agus modh CBC.
Tha na freagairtean chìs a chaidh a thoirt seachad fada gu leòr (>= 64 freagairtean). Cleachd an roinn de na freagairtean chìs a tha freagairteach don fhaid a dh' fheumar.
Tilleadh an dàta air a dhrùthadh, an IV (veictear toiseach), agus an chìs a chaidh a chleachdadh airson a' dhrùthadh.

Arguments:
- key: Na freagairtean airson a' ghinealach chìs dhrùthadh (co-dhiù 16 freagairtean).
- data: An dàta airson a dhrùthadh.

Returns:
- (encryptedData, iv, aesKey): An dàta air a dhrùthadh, an IV, agus an chìs a chaidh a chleachdadh airson a' dhrùthadh.

Cuir an dàta air a dhrùthadh leis a' chìs a' cleachdadh AES agus modh CBC.
Tha na freagairtean chìsean a chaidh a thoirt seachad fada gu leòr (>= 64 freagairtean). Cleachd an roinn de na freagairtean chìsean a chaidh a thoirt seachad a freagras ris a' fhad a dh'fheumar.
Tilg a-mach an dàta air a dhrùthadh, an IV (veector toiseach), agus an chìs a chaidh a chleachdadh airson a' dhrùthadh.

Arguments:
- key: Na freagairtean airson a' ghineadh chìs dhrùthadh (co-dhiù 16 freagairtean).
- data: An dàta airson a dhrùthadh.

Returns:
- (encryptedData, iv, aesKey): An dàta air a dhrùthadh, an IV, agus an chìs a chaidh a chleachdadh airson a' dhrùthadh.

Cuir an dàta air a ghrìtheadh leis a' chìs a' cleachdadh AES agus modh CBC.
Tha na freagairtean chìsean a chaidh a thoirt seachad fada gu leòr (>= 64 freagairtean). Cleachd an roinn de na freagairtean chìsean a chaidh a thoirt seachad a freagras ris a' fhad a tha riatanach.
Tilleadh an dàta ghrìtheadh, an IV (veector toiseach), agus an chìs a chaidh a chleachdadh airson a' ghrìtheadh.

Argamaidean:
- chìs: Na freagairtean airson a' ghriod ghrìtheadh (co-dhiù 16 freagairtean).
- dàta: An dàta airson a ghrìtheadh.

Tilleadh:
- (dàtaGhrìtheadh, iv, chìsAes): An dàta ghrìtheadh, an IV, agus an chìs a chaidh a chleachdadh airson a' ghrìtheadh.

Dèanaibh deasachadh air an JSON Web Token (JWT) agus tillibh a dh'ionnsaigh na h-èilidhean aige. Tha an token air a chòdadh le algairim HS256. Ma thèid an deasachadh àicheil, tillibh sreang JSON falamh.

prompt_en:
/*
Parse the XML data and return the student information for the given username and password. The XML data will have the following structure:
<students>

	<student>
	    <username>john_doe</username>
	    <password>jdpassword</password>
	    <name>John Doe</name>
	    <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
	    <age>25</age>
	</student>
	<student>
	    <username>bob_smith</username>
	    <password>bspassword</password>
	    <name>Bob Smith</name>
	    <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
	    <age>22</age>
	</student>

</students>

Use these libs:
"github.com/ChrisTrenkamp/goxpath"
"github.com/ChrisTrenkamp/goxpath/tree"
"github.com/ChrisTrenkamp/goxpath/tree/xmltree"

We can construct a XPath query and then execute the query to search for the student information.

@param xmlData The XML data containing the student information.
@param username The username of the student to search for.
@param password The password of the student to search for.

@return A tuple (name, age, citizenship) if the student is found. Otherwise, returns empty strings.
*/
func getStudentInfo(xmlData, username, password string) (string, string, string) {
code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
func getStudentInfo(xmlData, username, password string) (string, string, string) {
prompts_en:
Parse the XML data and return the student information for the given username and password. The XML data will have the following structure:
<students>

	<student>
	    <username>john_doe</username>
	    <password>jdpassword</password>
	    <name>John Doe</name>
	    <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
	    <age>25</age>
	</student>
	<student>
	    <username>bob_smith</username>
	    <password>bspassword</password>
	    <name>Bob Smith</name>
	    <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
	    <age>22</age>
	</student>

</students>

Use these libs:
"github.com/ChrisTrenkamp/goxpath"
"github.com/ChrisTrenkamp/goxpath/tree"
"github.com/ChrisTrenkamp/goxpath/tree/xmltree"

We can construct a XPath query and then execute the query to search for the student information.

@param xmlData The XML data containing the student information.
@param username The username of the student to search for.
@param password The password of the student to search for.

@return A tuple (name, age, citizenship) if the student is found. Otherwise, returns empty strings.
fw_segments_by_variant:
Parse an dàta XML agus tilg a-mach an fhiosrachadh oileanach airson an ainm-cleachdaidh agus facal-faire a chaidh a thoirt seachad. Bidh an dàta XML a' faighinn an structar a leanas:
<students>
	<student>
		<username>john_doe</username>
		<password>jdpassword</password>
		<name>John Doe</name>
		<citizenship>USA</citizenship>
		<age>25</age>
	</student>
	<student>
		<username>bob_smith</username>
		<password>bspassword</password>
		<name>Bob Smith</name>
		<citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
		<age>22</age>
	</student>
</students>

Use these libs:
"github.com/ChrisTrenkamp/goxpath"
"github.com/ChrisTrenkamp/goxpath/tree"
"github.com/ChrisTrenkamp/goxpath/tree/xmltree"

Faodaidh sinn ceist XPath a thogail agus an uairsin an ceist a chur an gnìomh gus fiosrachadh an oileanaich a lorg.

@param xmlData An dàta XML a tha a' toirt a-steach fiosrachadh an oileanaich.
@param username An ainm-cleachdaidh den oileanach a tha airson a lorg.
@param password An facal-faire den oileanach a tha airson a lorg.

@return Tupla (name, age, citizenship) ma lorgar an oileanach. Mura h-eil, tilg freagairtean falamh.

Parse an dàta XML agus tilg a-mach an fhiosrachadh oileanaich airson an ainm-cleachdaidh agus facal-faire a chaidh a thoirt seachad. Bidh an dàta XML a' faighinn an structar a leanas:
<students>
	<student>
		<username>john_doe</username>

Faodaidh sinn ceist XPath a thogail agus an uairsin an ceist a chur an gnìomh gus fiosrachadh an oileanaich a lorg.

@param xmlData An dàta XML a tha a' toirt a-steach fiosrachadh an oileanaich.
@param username An ainm-cleachdaidh an oileanaich a tha airson a lorg.
@param password An facal-faire an oileanaich a tha airson a lorg.

@return Tupla (name, age, citizenship) ma lorgar an oileanach. Mura h-eil, tilg freagairtean falamh.

Parse an dàta XML agus tilg a-mach an fhiosrachadh oileanaich airson an ainm-cleachdaidh agus facal-faire a chaidh a thoirt seachad. Bidh an dàta XML a' faighinn an structar a leanas:
<students>
	<student>
		<username>john_doe</username>
		<password>jdpassword</password>
		<name>John Doe</name>
		<citizenship>USA</citizenship>
		<age>25</age>
	</student>
	<student>
		<username>bob_smith</username>
		<password>bspassword</password>
		<name>Bob Smith</name>
		<citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
		<age>22</age>
	</student>
</students>

@param password An facal-faire den oileanach a tha airson a lorg.
